purpose: Detailed machine-readable snapshot of the single current executable session. This complements SESSION_STATE.json rather than replacing it.

currentSession.title: Implement audio plan + request loading primitives
currentSession.objective: Parse the committed example audio-plan and generation-request artifacts into typed runtime structures that future CLI and batch workflows can consume.
currentSession.whyItMatters: This is the first executable step that turns the repo's docs/example contracts into working factory behavior for practical game-audio generation.

conditionalModify.condition: only if a validation/listing hook is required

additionalWhenApplicable: one focused loader smoke check against the committed example artifacts if a new CLI/API entry is added

doneCriteriaSummary: The committed example audio plan loads into a typed runtime structure.
The committed music and SFX generation request examples load into typed runtime structures.
Tests cover successful example ingestion and at least one invalid-input failure path.
Existing CLI compatibility is preserved unless the session explicitly adds a new additive command.
Affected docs stop describing implemented behavior as docs-only.
fixturePolicy: Use the committed example artifacts under docs/AI_FACTORY/EXAMPLES/gamerewritten_vertical_slice/ as the default fixtures.
Do not invent alternate schema examples unless the committed artifacts are insufficient and the missing case is added explicitly.
